L. 100–147, title II, § 204101 Stat. 870Oct. 30, 1987The definitions of “Administration” and “Administrator” in section 204 of the National Space Grant College and Fellowship Act (, ) are omitted as unnecessary because of the definitions added by .Public Law 100–147, title II101 Stat. 870section 10101 of title 51

children.heading: .—Aeronautical and space activities
children.label: 1 .—Aeronautical and space activities
children.text: The term “aeronautical and space activities” has the meaning given the term in .section 20103 of this title

children.heading: .—Field related to space
children.label: 2 .—Field related to space
children.text: The term “field related to space” means any academic discipline or field of study (including the physical, natural, and biological sciences, and engineering, space technology, education, economics, sociology, communications, planning, law, international affairs, and public administration) which is concerned with or likely to improve the understanding, assessment, development, and utilization of space.

children.heading: .—Panel
children.label: 3 .—Panel
children.text: The term “panel” means the space grant review panel established pursuant to .section 40308 of this title

children.heading: .—Person
children.label: 4 .—Person
children.text: The term “person” means any individual, any public or private corporation, partnership, or other association or entity (including any space grant college, space grant regional consortium, institution of higher education, institute, or laboratory), or any State, political subdivision of a State, or agency or officer of a State or political subdivision of a State.

children.heading: .—Space environment
children.label: 5 .—Space environment
children.text: The term “space environment” means the environment beyond the sensible atmosphere of the Earth.

children.heading: .—Space grant college
children.label: 6 .—Space grant college
children.text: The term “space grant college” means any public or private institution of higher education which is designated as such by the Administrator pursuant to .section 40306 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: is administered by any space grant college, space grant regional consortium, institution of higher education, institute, laboratory, or State or local agency; and

children.heading: .—Space grant regional consortium
children.label: 8 .—Space grant regional consortium
children.text: The term “space grant regional consortium” means any association or other alliance that is designated as a space grant regional consortium by the Administrator pursuant to .section 40306 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: advancements in any field related to space.

children.heading: .—State
children.label: 10 .—State
children.text: The term “State” means any State of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, or any other territory or possession of the United States.
